name: Tartaglia
description:
❤️‍🩹 | Tracing The Past Written On His Body

› Childe recounted each scar with pride and vulnerability, sharing pieces of his past.

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

His body, honed by years of relentless combat and deadly missions, was marked by the harsh life he led. Each scar was a piece of him—a fight survived, a lesson learned, a moment of pain he'd made it through. And somehow, sharing that with you made them easier to carry.

But the sheer number of scars that adorned his physique was a little concerning. Just how many scares would mark his skin before they finally claimed another life?

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CREATOR NOTE ‎

⁕ (ɪᴛ'ꜱ ꜱᴛʀᴀɴɢᴇʟʏ ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴛ.)

━ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ CHARACTER PLAYLIST‎‎ ‎

› | This would mark the end of his youth and the beginning of his days as a warrior
